title: New Plugsuit designs for Shin Eva
display_title: New Plugsuit designs for Shin Eva
wikitext:
[]: New Plugsuit designs for Shin Eva             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Feb 22, 2020 1:39 am Uhh, I haven't seen a thread for this yet? Kinda surprised. Examples here! tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: New Plugsuit designs for Shin Eva             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Feb 22, 2020 8:07 am They didn't get their own thread; they were posted to the main one instead. post/892259/Shin-Eva-Official-Social-Media/#892259

[]: Re: New Plugsuit designs for Shin Eva             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Feb 22, 2020 4:36 pm Had not seen that figure on the right!

[]: Re: New Plugsuit designs for Shin Eva             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Feb 24, 2020 2:25 pm So, ReiQ's plugsuit is the only one that hasn't changed at all, right?

[]: Re: New Plugsuit designs for Shin Eva             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Feb 24, 2020 2:54 pm At the moment yes. Rei Q's role in the final film may not leave much room for a new plugsuit. Though I honestly would not be surprised if everyone got a new plugsuit over the course of the final film.

[]: Re: New Plugsuit designs for Shin Eva             Quote Post by MuscleRobo » Mon Feb 24, 2020 3:04 pm Not to be a pervert but could we normally see belly buttons in non-test plug suits? Or is the navel just to increase the eros appeal of an expensive statue?

[]: Re: New Plugsuit designs for Shin Eva             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Feb 24, 2020 4:56 pm MuscleRobo wrote: Not to be a pervert but could we normally see belly buttons in non-test plug suits? Or is the navel just to increase the eros appeal of an expensive statue?

[]: Re: New Plugsuit designs for Shin Eva             Quote Post by The Cruel » Tue Feb 25, 2020 4:33 am To indicate FINALs context, its symbolism that these are the same Plugsuits from 3.0 and the colors got changed to the accent-colors of the characters in homage to their first Plugsuits. If FINAL were released earlier or together with 3.0, maybe the colors of the Plugsuits weren‘t changed.
